codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/register'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "email": "auth-test-1782956908690@example.com",
      "password": "TestPassword1"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/user-data'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer f8f20f285f51adae8ee191ac59f3094775fea4a60800687e4c6ffafc4333bead'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

    }
)

print(data)
